# nullcloud_regions (Data Source)

Returns the list of valid NullCloud regions and their availability zones.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `regions` (Attributes List) List of available regions. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--regions))

<a id="nestedatt--regions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `regions`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) Region name (e.g. us-east).
- `zones` (Attributes List) Availability zones within this region. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--regions--zones))

<a id="nestedatt--regions--zones"></a>
### Nested Schema for `regions.zones`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) Zone name (e.g. us-east-1).
